runTitle: GraphRAG variant direct supervisor stability recheck after degraded-single enable

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period effective usage 7.8436 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage spike before targeted QA #5.

pendingImprovements.title: Topology variant direct supervisor path still has intermittent degraded quality
pendingImprovements.note: After enabling ALLOW_DEGRADED_SINGLE, HTTP 500 was not observed in 5 attempts, but one response fell back to 'no_provider' message and one returned low-quality decomposition text without tool usage.

notes: Cloud Run service updated with ALLOW_DEGRADED_SINGLE=true and revision ai-engine-00307-zwt serving 100% traffic

attempt #4 returned degraded single fallback text '현재 AI 엔진 모델이 일시적으로 사용 불가능합니다' (metadata.fallback=true, fallbackReason=no_provider)
attempt #3 returned decomposition-style low-quality text with toolsCalled=0 and ragCount=0
error-rate improved versus prior run (UNKNOWN_ERROR 500 removed), but operator-quality stability remains unresolved
